domains.title: Onboarding & first-run setup
domains.rationale: All default-pack seeds are correctly created in scheduled state with appropriate logs, meeting the journey expectations.

domains.title: Core data model & overview surface
domains.rationale: All documented task kinds reached the expected scheduled state with correct log entries

domains.title: Habits
domains.rationale: The reminder completed and correctly spawned a scheduled output onComplete task, with appropriate terminal states and logs.

domains.title: Routines & multi-step daily flows
domains.rationale: All terminal statuses and pipeline relationships match the described multi-step flow

domains.title: Tasks (one-off)
domains.rationale: The task reached completed status with appropriate reason and no required firedAt, respecting early completion rules.

domains.title: Goals
domains.rationale: The watcher was correctly scheduled with the quiet_hours gate and remains in the scheduled state as expected.

domains.title: Reminders & escalation ladder
domains.rationale: The high-priority reminder correctly resulted in a single scheduled task without premature firing, adhering to the escalation ladder semantics.

domains.title: Calendar journeys
domains.rationale: The recap task correctly transitioned to skipped and the followup onSkip child was created and remains scheduled as expected.

domains.title: Inbox & email triage
domains.rationale: The task reached completed status with correct output fields and log entries, meeting all required invariants.

domains.title: Travel
domains.rationale: The approval task completed and correctly created a scheduled output child as defined by the onComplete pipeline.

domains.title: Follow-up repair (relationships)
domains.rationale: The watcher completed as expected after the subject update, with correct status and timestamps.

domains.title: Documents, signatures, portals
domains.rationale: The reminder failed and correctly spawned a scheduled followup child as defined by the onFail pipeline.

domains.title: Self-control / app & website blockers
domains.rationale: The task correctly evaluated the travel gate, fired, and produced the expected terminal status and log entries.

domains.title: Group chat handoff
domains.rationale: The custom watcher task is correctly scheduled with the specified properties and no erroneous state transitions.

domains.title: Multi-channel & cross-channel search
domains.rationale: The task was correctly created with the required contextRequest and remains in the scheduled state as expected.

domains.title: Activity signals & screen context
domains.rationale: The task reached completed status via the health signal completion check within the lookback window, and all required fields and logs are correct.

domains.title: Approval queues & action gating
domains.rationale: The approval task was correctly dismissed with appropriate terminal status and log entries, and no firing was required.

domains.title: Identity merge (canonical person)
domains.rationale: The watcher reached completed status with correct logs and no required fields missing.

domains.title: Memory recall
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with the required output configuration and no violations of the spine rules.

domains.title: Connectors & permissions
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with high priority, proper metadata, and no premature firing, matching the expected end state.

domains.title: Health, money, screen time
domains.rationale: The watcher was correctly scheduled with the appropriate completion check and no premature firing or completion logged.

domains.title: Push notifications
domains.rationale: The high-priority reminder correctly resulted in a single scheduled task with appropriate fields and no premature firing or missing required contracts.

domains.title: Remote sessions
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with high priority and appropriate metadata, and no further actions are required in this scenario.

domains.title: Settings & UX
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with ownerVisible false and appropriate metadata, and no firing is required for a shadow task.

domains.title: REST API access flows
domains.rationale: The task includes source=plugin and ownerVisible=false, remains scheduled, and the log correctly records the scheduling transition.

domains.title: Workflows (event-triggered)
domains.rationale: The watcher completed and correctly spawned a scheduled output child as defined by the onComplete pipeline.

domains.title: Multilingual coverage
domains.rationale: The reminder was scheduled with the correct locale metadata and remains in the expected scheduled state.

domains.title: Suspected-but-unconfirmed flows
domains.rationale: The task reached the expected dismissed status with appropriate log entries and metadata, satisfying all required semantics.
